## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outreach and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, SEO updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Search volatility continues with impression jumps and click falls across the industry](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Content production and refreshes are progressing well, with positive results from recent updates](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [LLM visibility dropped 30% week-over-week, primarily due to ChatGPT decline](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Team to investigate potential impact of homepage updates on ChatGPT visibility](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

## Topics

### Search Performance Update

  - [Forecasting 20K clicks for the month, down from 28K in previous months](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [GSC shows traffic decline stabilizing, but still volatile](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Average position improved dramatically month-over-month (28 to 13)](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Industry-wide impacts: Business Insider reporting 55% drops, NYT organic search share fell from 44% to 36.5%](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Non-branded performance shows impression increase, click decline, and position improvement](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Sales email templates refresh continues to deliver strong results](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Email subject lines post (from last year) saw dramatic click decline, potential candidate for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Customer retention strategies post dropped out of top 5, likely due to overall volatility](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### LLM Visibility

  - [30% drop week-over-week, primarily in ChatGPT (22% decline for homepage)](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Perplexity and Gemini visibility increased](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Top LLM traffic pages: sales forecasting, data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [All tracked competitors down about 1 point in visibility](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [28.6% drop in LLM traffic contrasts with improved positioning metrics](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Content Workflow Updates

  - [Team to review and update the "source of truth" doc on Outreach capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Recent feedback has improved accuracy of platform descriptions in content](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### Blog Post Updates

  - [Final revisions on "11 best sales tools" article in progress](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Agent washing blog post ready for final small changes before staging](https://fathom.video/share/owQbx8yMX_Cc8Vg1pkTC_c9nHyrc5L-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)

## Next Steps
